questions.question: A painting's dimensions are $20 \cdot 30$ inches. If it is enlarged by $25\%$, what is its new area?
A music festival has $1200$ attendees. If $18\%$ of them are wearing festival t-shirts, how many attendees are wearing t-shirts?
A drummer's rhythm pattern has a tempo of $100$ beats per minute. If the tempo increases by $15\%$, what is the new tempo?
A sculpture's price is $$8000$. If the artist offers a $12\%$ discount, how much will the buyer pay?
A musician's album has $15$ tracks. If $40\%$ of the tracks are instrumental, how many instrumental tracks are there?
A dance troupe has $50$ members. If $22\%$ of them are beginners, how many beginners are there?
A painter's canvas is $40$ inches wide. If it is enlarged by $30\%$, what is its new width?
An art gallery has $250$ pieces on display. If $16\%$ of them are sculptures, how many sculptures are there?
A band's album sales increased from $2000$ to $2800$ in a year. Calculate the percent increase in album sales.
A photographer's website has $1500$ visits per month. If the website's traffic increases by $20\%$ in the next quarter, calculate the new number of visits per month.

teacher_rules: Use the percent increase formula: $\frac{New - Old}{Old} \cdot 100\%$
Check the units of the answer
Read the question carefully to understand what is given and what is asked
